description_long: This is a small, rectangular wooden cabin with a light gray, shingled gable roof and simple, clean lines. The front facade features two large, vertically oriented glass doors with blue-tinted panes, framed by the natural wood exterior. The rear side has two square windows, symmetrically placed, also with blue-tinted glass. The cabin's exterior is clad in vertical wooden paneling, giving it a modern yet rustic appearance. The roof has a slight overhang with visible rafters, adding architectural detail. There are no visible porches, decorative trim, or additional structures attached to the cabin.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a gray shingled gable roof, large glass doors at the front, and square windows at the rear, featuring a modern rustic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large glass doors with blue-tinted panes set in a wooden facade beneath a shingled roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gable end with two square windows and the full length of the shingled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden wall and no visible windows or doors, highlighting the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two square windows, mirroring the other gable end, and the shingled roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in gray asphalt shingles and slight overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large, vertically oriented windows integrated into the front doors, and two square windows symmetrically placed on the rear gable end
attribute_door_placement: Double glass doors centered on the front facade
